summary: Environment blocker is cleared and wrapper-backed iOS validation passes, but the current branch is not merge-ready: the button still violates parts of the token contract and the branch includes out-of-scope remediation/config changes.

requirements.evidence: LSButton foreground/icon rendering flows through LSText and LSIcon helpers that resolve with hard-coded colors in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSText.swift:12-24 and ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSIcon.swift:16-30, so the button is not fully token-resolved end-to-end.
requirements.remediation: Resolve LSButton text and icon colors directly from generated theme tokens, or refactor the shared color helpers to stop using hard-coded values.

requirements.evidence: Pressed primary uses theme.colors.accent.pressed in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:147-152 instead of the task-specified primary action pressed token path.
requirements.remediation: Map the pressed primary state to the task-specified action/primary pressed token contract and cover that exact mapping in tests.

requirements.evidence: Disabled button colors are derived by opacity-dimming the base colors in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:182-203 rather than resolving dedicated disabled action-state tokens.
requirements.remediation: Use explicit disabled token values for background and foreground, or align the theme API so LSButton can resolve the required disabled state contract directly.

requirements.evidence: Outline button layout uses correct border presence, but the button still inherits non-token-resolved text/icon colors and variable horizontal padding via LSButtonStyle.metrics in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButtonStyle.swift:84-98.
requirements.remediation: Keep outline spacing at the spec padding and make the icon/text color path fully token-resolved.

requirements.evidence: LSButtonStories defines all six atoms.button.{variant} ids and LaneShadowStories aggregates LSButtonStories.all.
LSButtonStyle.metrics returns minWidth/minHeight of 44 via theme.touchTarget.minTouchTarget and theme.control.minHeight, and the targeted test passed.
LSButton.dispatch guards disabled state and the targeted test_action_fires_exactly_once_per_press passed.
Host grep gate found no literal Color references in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift.
Host grep gate found no Image(systemName:) references in ios/LaneShadow/Views/Atoms/LSButton.swift.

findings.evidence: The button label and icons are not fully token-resolved because LSText and LSIcon use hard-coded color helpers rather than generated theme token values.
findings.fix: Route LSButton text/icon colors through generated theme token values end-to-end, or refactor the shared helpers before merging the button atom.

findings.evidence: The branch now contains remediation/configuration changes outside the task's writeAllowed scope, so the current branch is not merge-ready as a clean UC-ATM-02-ios implementation unit.
findings.fix: Split or land the environment-remediation changes independently, then keep the UC-ATM-02-ios task branch scoped to the allowed button files and required generated-project updates only.

findings.evidence: Horizontal padding varies by size (12/16/24) even though the button concept specifies fixed horizontal padding of spacing.4 / 16px across variants.
findings.fix: Normalize horizontal padding to the spec token for every button size, or update the task/spec if size-dependent padding is the intended design.

validation.scope_check: fail: branch includes remediation/configuration files outside the task writeAllowed scope
validation.grep_gates: pass: no literal Color or Image(systemName:) references in LSButton.swift; all six story ids present and LaneShadowStories aggregates LSButtonStories
validation.swiftformat: pass: targeted swiftformat --lint exited 0 for LSButton files
validation.build: pass: wrapper-backed xcodebuild build exited 0 in .kb-run/worktrees/UC-ATM-02-ios
validation.tests: pass: wrapper-backed xcodebuild test -only-testing:LaneShadowTests/LSButtonTests exited 0 with 7 tests, 0 failures
validation.git_status: clean for product files; only hook checksum artifacts changed during review tooling
